command: fabio kql-database deeplink --workspace $WS_ID --id $KDB_ID --kql "StormEvents | where State == 'TEXAS' | take 100"
description: Generates a deeplink URL to open a KQL query in the Fabric portal query workbench or ADX Web Explorer. Auto-detects cluster type from URI.
notes: Use --style fabric|adx to override auto-detection. ADX style generates https://dataexplorer.azure.com/... URLs.

query_examples.description: Get the deeplink URL to open in a browser.
Get the detected link style (fabric or adx).
